task_objective: Fix Last Operation timestamp to show in local timezone instead of UTC.
tests_added: src/formatting/dateTime.test.ts: formatHistoryTimestamp converts a UTC ISO timestamp to the given local timezone
src/formatting/dateTime.test.ts: formatHistoryTimestamp converts to a US west-coast zone (UTC-7)
src/formatting/dateTime.test.ts: formatHistoryTimestamp returns the raw value when unparseable
src/formatting/dateTime.test.ts: formatHistoryTimestamp returns empty string for null/undefined
design_decisions: Added a dedicated `formatHistoryTimestamp` that leverages `new Date()` combined with `.toLocaleDateString` and `.toLocaleTimeString` to respect local timezones or a configured timezone.
Removed `formatTime12h` and `formatDateMDY` as they manually substringed UTC strings without timezone conversions.
Deleted the python backend test `test_last_operation_date_display.py` as its structural assertions enforcing the removed formatters were now obsolete.
results: Successfully verified via vitest and merged to dev branch. Dev release dispatched.
